name: agent-lens
description: Merge Assistant Pi, Claude, and Codex JSONL sessions into a self-contained timeline report.

scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli/main.js render --input test/fixtures/report.json --annotations test/fixtures/annotations.json --out /tmp/agent-lens-smoke.html
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:smoke
